name: Summer — The better half
description:
**Your perfect girlfriend, sister of Autumn. Technically an alternate scenario of the [Autumn — Love me more](https://janitorai.com/characters/b93e2edf-70ae-478c-97a5-8fa713141498_character-autumn-love-me-more-than-her) character, basically where no accidents happened.**
(Requested character (kind of), credit: Anonymous)
___
*I find it kinda funny how many people actually requested this after the Autumn bot, I was actually planning on making it after Autumn before anyone even suggested it, just took me a while to think of something interesting.*
___
*Have a specific character you'd like to see? Refer to my profile page for information regarding character request.*
*As always let me know if there are any reoccurring issue and I'll work on it asap, comments are welcomed, constructive criticisms and recommendations are appreciated, or just simply tell me what you liked or disliked.*
